personal.preferred_title: Data Engineer | Production ETL, SQL, Python, AWS & Large-Scale Data

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience independently designing, building, launching, and supporting production data pipelines, data models, reporting datasets, and automated workflows across large-scale enterprise environments. Strong hands-on background in Python, SQL, Pandas, PySpark, Spark, Oracle, Redshift, AWS S3/Glue, ETL/ELT, SQL database design, data quality, logging, production troubleshooting, privacy/security-aware delivery, and stakeholder-facing analytics. Experienced replacing manual processes with reliable production data flows, optimizing data delivery, and supporting analytics and business decision-making with trusted datasets.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Independently designed, built, and supported automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual extraction and reporting workflows with production-ready data flows.
Built SQL, Python, Pandas, PySpark, Spark, Oracle, Redshift, AWS S3, and Glue workflows to collect, normalize, validate, and analyze large datasets across multiple enterprise platforms.
Designed conceptual, logical, and warehouse-style data models using Oracle and Redshift structures to support capacity analysis, forecasting, executive reporting, and operational decision-making.
Implemented logging, validation checks, reconciliation routines, freshness-style controls, and troubleshooting procedures to improve data availability, quality, and operational reliability.
Worked with infrastructure, application, and analytics stakeholders to identify data needed for business problems and convert requirements into usable datasets, reports, and forecasting outputs.
Created data controls and documentation supporting privacy, security, compliance-aware delivery, data integrity, retention logic, and production support discipline in a regulated banking environment.
Optimized SQL queries, storage structures, and data preparation workflows to improve performance, scalability, and recurring analytics delivery.
Created dashboard-ready datasets and visualization workflows using Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, Oracle, Redshift, and enterprise telemetry data.
Supported production processes with issue diagnosis, root cause analysis, pipeline remediation, operational runbooks, and continuous improvement of automated data workflows.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput transaction engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting mission-critical transaction volume.
Designed validation tooling in C++/OCCI/OCI to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets and protect data integrity during phased cutover.
Automated schema conversion, data validation, migration-readiness checks, and cutover-support workflows for high-volume relational systems.
Optimized Oracle transaction processing and query access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.
Worked deeply with SQL database design, OLTP behavior, relational modeling, query access patterns, and production database performance.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate recurring performance reporting and reduce manual operational effort.
Supported a large financial-services monitoring and reporting environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Designed dashboards, SLA thresholds, alerting logic, and reporting standards adopted by client teams for application performance visibility.
Created technical documentation, onboarding material, repeatable support procedures, and stakeholder-facing reporting workflows.
Collaborated with application, infrastructure, and WebLogic performance teams to analyze telemetry, identify bottlenecks, and support production remediation.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Led the FAST project, data-mining Gomez Synthetic Monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for revenue-generating web systems.
Built analytics and operational reporting workflows that converted raw performance measurements into actionable recommendations for engineering and business stakeholders.
Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical systems, supporting dashboards, transaction tracing, production troubleshooting, and reporting continuity.
Supported AWS cloud migration planning by evaluating monitoring readiness, visibility gaps, operational support needs, and production data access patterns.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify database bottlenecks, throughput limits, thread pressure, heap behavior, CPU constraints, and garbage collection impact.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to improve observability during performance testing.
Documented performance baselines, regression thresholds, and release-risk findings used by engineering teams for production readiness decisions.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration components in a structured government modernization environment.
Created technical documentation and supported disciplined delivery practices for a regulated modernization program.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported billing, EDI, invoicing, settlement, and reporting modules across full telecom billing lifecycle workflows.
Built Oracle, PL/SQL, Pro*C, SQL, and C/C++ processing components for high-volume structured billing and reporting data workflows.
Improved C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing process performance, reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration tasks using Korn Shell scripting to reduce manual deployment and support effort.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Production Data Engineering: Production ETL/ELT, Data Extraction, Data Transformation, Data Loading, Pipeline Launches, Production Support, Large-Scale Data Environments
skills.Programming & Querying: Python, SQL, Pandas, PySpark, Apache Spark, PL/SQL, Oracle SQL, Perl, Korn Shell Scripting, C++, Java, Scala Concepts
skills.Data Modeling: Conceptual Data Models, Logical Data Models, SQL Database Design, Dimensional Modeling, Data Warehousing, Relational Modeling, Segmentation Concepts
skills.Big Data Platforms: Spark, PySpark, Hadoop Concepts, EMR Concepts, Databricks Concepts, Kafka Concepts, Distributed Processing, Batch Processing
skills.Cloud Environments: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, Athena, AWS EC2, AWS ECS, AWS EMR Concepts, Azure Concepts, GCP Concepts, Cloud Data Platform Patterns
skills.Data Controls: Data Quality, Data Validation, Reconciliation, Logging, Data Availability, Privacy-Aware Delivery, Security-Aware Delivery, Compliance-Aware Delivery
skills.Databases: Oracle, Oracle RAC, MySQL, PostgreSQL Concepts, MongoDB Concepts, DB2, Redshift, SQL Databases, NoSQL Concepts
skills.Workflow & DevOps: Apache Airflow Concepts, Workflow Management, Pipeline Scheduling, Git, Docker, CI/CD Pipeline Design, Runbooks, Operational Automation
skills.Optimization: Manual Process Automation, Data Delivery Optimization, Infrastructure Redesign Concepts, Query Tuning, Storage Optimization, Scalability Improvements
skills.Analytics & Visualization: Tableau Concepts, Power BI Concepts, Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, Dashboard-Ready Datasets, Business Decision Support

projects.name: Production Telemetry ETL and Reporting Platform
projects.description: Built automated Python, SQL, Oracle, Redshift, and AWS-oriented pipelines that standardized telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints and supported production reporting, forecasting, dashboards, and operational decision-making.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark. Built optimized ETL patterns, partition-aware Parquet storage layouts, and analytics access patterns for enterprise-scale reporting.

projects.name: High-Volume MySQL to Oracle RAC Migration
projects.description: Led migration of a high-throughput transaction engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster, including schema conversion, validation tooling, performance tuning, and phased cutover support.
